description: Stylish to the T, these dress shoes from red tape are perfect for all formal occasions. Slip into these fabulous oxfords to look like you mean business. The pointed toe silhouette adds to the charm of these shoes, coupled with a perforated pattern. Wear them to look suave in a jiffy! A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design for a more stylish look Perforated pattern for added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Softly padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Leather inner to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Padded leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Multi-directional lugs and grooves on the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
